examples: Anita: You are loopy now because you've skipped too, too many classes.
"But before he went loopy he was the life and soul of the party, " said Fred.
I guess when you do that slow little loopy thing, that you want to capitalize those letters?
Be sure to try the Loopy Bar, a Rice Krispies-treat-like dessert made with Froot Loops.
Muldoon was, in his eccentric and loopy way, tireless and a bit of a genius.
